suggestions.title: vibeStreak prop never passed to Office — fern permanently stuck as seedling
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1043 renders <Office> without a vibeStreak prop. Office.jsx defaults vibeStreak to 0, so plantStage is always plantStageNames[0] = 'seedling'. The fern never grows regardless of streak length. Fix: add vibeStreak={vibeStreak} to the Office call.

suggestions.title: workers.json missing roster key — worker filter bar shows only 'All Workers'
suggestions.description: syncFromGitHub sets roster = data.roster ?? []. workers.json has no roster key, so roster state is always []. Dashboard worker filter bar renders {roster.map(...)} producing zero buttons. Individual worker filtering is completely broken. Fix: add a roster array to workers.json, or derive it from DEFAULT_ROSTER when data.roster is absent.

suggestions.title: VibeSparkline clips 'Crushing It' dot — top circle overflows SVG viewBox
suggestions.description: y = 12 - rank * 2.5. For 'crushing' (rank 4), y=2 and r=3, so the circle top edge is at y=-1 — outside the viewBox '0 0 64 14'. The highest-rank dot is half-clipped. Fix: change scale to y = 11 - rank * 1.8, mapping ranks 0→11 through 4→3.8, all safely inside the viewBox.

suggestions.title: VibeSparkline shows stale history — only refreshes when vibe key changes
suggestions.description: StatsBar reads localStorage in a useEffect([vibe.key]). If the team stays on the same vibe for 10 poll cycles, App.jsx writes 10 new entries to localStorage but StatsBar never re-reads. The sparkline stays frozen at the first-load snapshot. Fix: lift vibeHistory state up to App.jsx and pass it as a prop to StatsBar, eliminating the stale localStorage read.

suggestions.title: Coffee Corner chatting badge fires on any 2+ idle workers regardless of floor position
suggestions.description: coffee-corner--chatting activates when idleWorkers.length >= 2. But idle workers wander the entire floor — they may be at desks or by the window. The badge shows 'chatting' on a slow day even when workers are visually scattered. Fix: define a subset of idle workers as 'at coffee' (e.g. those with wander variant 1) and pass that count to the coffee corner block.

suggestions.title: useTimeTick fires every 60s in hidden tabs — wasteful re-renders while user is away
suggestions.description: useTimeTick(60_000) runs setTick unconditionally, re-rendering the full app tree to refresh relative timestamps on a tab nobody is watching. The main poll loop already respects document.visibilityState. Fix: skip setTick when document.hidden is true inside the interval callback.

suggestions.title: Coffee Corner chatting badge shows no names — anonymous label misses the delight opportunity
suggestions.description: When chatting is active the corner shows '☕ chatting' but nothing identifies who is there. Workers are visually scattered on the floor, not clustered at the corner. A tooltip or subtitle listing idle worker first names (e.g. 'Luna & Dave are here') would complete the feature and give it informational value. Fix: pass idleWorkers to the corner block and render their names in a title attribute or subtitle span.

suggestions.title: Two confetti layers can stack simultaneously — 60 animated spans cover the entire UI
suggestions.description: confettiActive (vibe rank increase) and workerConfetti (task shipped) are independent flags. When both trigger in the same poll cycle, 60 confetti spans render simultaneously, burying the completion toast and creating visual chaos. Fix: queue confetti so only one fires at a time, or merge both into a single confetti state with priority (worker > vibe).

suggestions.title: VibeSparkline SVG missing role='img' — screen readers announce raw circle elements
suggestions.description: The SVG has aria-label='Vibe history' but no role='img'. Without role='img', JAWS and older NVDA skip the aria-label and read individual circle elements instead. Fix: add role='img' to the SVG and extend the aria-label to include current vibe and data point count, e.g. 'Vibe history: 8 data points, currently Crushing It'.

suggestions.title: Workers with status 'done' vanish silently — no shipped-today summary anywhere
suggestions.description: activeWorkers filters to only working/idle/error. A done worker disappears from the office floor, workers grid, and StatsBar counts. There is no 'Shipped Today' tally. The activity log has completion events but no at-a-glance summary. Fix: add a done count to StatsBar and optionally a collapsed 'Shipped Today' section in the workers grid with greyed-out done cards.

suggestions.title: completionToast still uses 12 inline style declarations — CSS-class conversion still pending
suggestions.description: The completion toast in App.jsx renders with fully hardcoded inline styles (position, border, padding, fontSize, zIndex, animation, etc). Flagged in review 3, still not fixed. Cannot be themed via CSS variables or overridden in App.css. Fix: move to a .completion-toast class; keep only the dynamic border color as an inline style or --toast-color CSS variable.

suggestions.title: Poll loop recreates setInterval on every visibilitychange — minor timer churn
suggestions.description: handleVisibilityChange calls clearInterval + setInterval on every visibility toggle. Rapid alt-tabs create/destroy multiple timers in quick succession. getInterval() is also only evaluated at interval-creation time, not dynamically. Fix: use a single interval; read document.visibilityState inside pollTick itself to decide whether to skip or adjust behavior.
